source_point_summary: The excerpt is called very useless on its own.
routing_rationale: Preserved as the negative half of the tension rather than erased.

source_point_summary: A useless excerpt wastes focus and should not survive just by formal compliance.
routing_rationale: Turned into the added-benefit doctrine and constraints.

source_point_summary: Short is not enough; harmlessness matters.
routing_rationale: Preserved as a core owner standard, not treated as model doctrine.

source_point_summary: في الحديث ثلاثة مباحث can be kept in both excerpts because it is short and unobstructive.
routing_rationale: Converted into a concrete duplication pattern rather than lost in prose.

source_point_summary: The owner loves long deep excerpts, but this must not affect excerpting.
routing_rationale: Preserved as the tension between taste and objective criteria.

source_point_summary: The owner explicitly ends with A.
routing_rationale: Preserved without pretending the earlier criticism never happened.

source_point_summary: Context may raise value, but must not automatically convert retained value into strong standalone value.
routing_rationale: Preserved as the key context-laundering warning.

source_point_summary: The strongest owner-faithful reading may be A only under a special interpretation.
routing_rationale: Used to preserve the mixed force of the final answer.

source_point_summary: Short harmless structural text may deserve retention inside adjacent excerpts even when standalone power is weak.
routing_rationale: Turns raw packaging suggestions into explicit patterns.

source_point_summary: Do not let preference for long or short excerpts control objective excerpting.
routing_rationale: Preserved as a central nonnegotiable rather than a passing aside.
